info.title: Polygonscan API
info.description: Polygonscan block explorer API for the Polygon (MATIC) blockchain. Etherscan-compatible API providing account, contract, transaction, block, log, proxy, stats, and token endpoints.

get.description: Returns MATIC balance for a single address
Returns list of normal transactions by address
Returns contract ABI for verified contracts
Returns source code of a verified contract
Returns estimated time remaining until block
Returns block number closest to timestamp

result.description: Result data, type varies by endpoint
